rows.description: Computus Geo. Paynter Rectoris a secundo die Novembr. 1708 ad eundem diem 1709.
rows.notes: Based on visual verification, 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate transcription of the descriptive text (Geo. Paynter Rectoris a secundo die Novembr.). All extractors agreed on the row type (header) and the absence of monetary amounts.

'gemini-flash' and 'claude-haiku' correctly identified this as a header with no amounts, introducing the following entry. 'gpt-5-mini' incorrectly combined this line with the next, assigning amounts to this descriptive header. Visual inspection confirms this line is a header.

'gemini-flash' correctly identified the description 'In Cista'. 'gpt-5-mini' missed this as a distinct row. 'claude-haiku' misread the description as 'Om lista' and the pence as '10'. Visual verification confirms the amounts are 44 pounds, 17 shillings, and 1 pence, with a clear 'd' or 'ob' symbol indicating a 0.5 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' correctly identified the 1 pence and hinted at the symbol, but missed the fraction. This final value combines visual verification of description, whole pence, and fraction.
All extractors agreed on the row type (header) and the absence of monetary amounts. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate transcription of 'Arreragys' from the image.
Full consensus across 'gemini-flash', 'gpt-5-mini', and 'claude-haiku' for monetary amounts. 'gemini-flash' and 'claude-haiku' provided the most accurate description 'Guineas & anno'.

'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description 'Longwiteham & anno'. While all extractors agreed on the whole amounts (59 pounds, 19 shillings, 9 pence), only 'gemini-flash' correctly identified the 'ob' symbol as a 0.5 pence fraction, which was confirmed by visual verification.
Full consensus across 'gemini-flash', 'gpt-5-mini', and 'claude-haiku' for monetary amounts. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description 'min hennet in pt'.
Full consensus across 'gemini-flash', 'gpt-5-mini', and 'claude-haiku' for monetary amounts. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description, including the dash before '& anno'.
Full consensus across 'gemini-flash', 'gpt-5-mini', and 'claude-haiku' for monetary amounts. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description 'Cudlington Rry pro mich'.

Visual verification confirms the description 'merton Rry & mich.' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash') and the amounts '03 08 08' (matching 'gpt-5-mini' for values). 'gemini-flash' had 0 pence, and 'claude-haiku' had incorrect pounds and shillings.

All extractors agreed on the absence of amounts. 'claude-haiku' correctly identified it as a 'header' or 'subheader' (descriptive, no amounts). 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description of the text.
All extractors agreed on the absence of amounts. 'claude-haiku' correctly identified it as a 'Place name header'. 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini' provided the most accurate description 'Thrup'.

'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the description and the associated amounts. The amount '00 02 06' is visually present on the line immediately below the description, implicitly tied to it. 'claude-haiku' incorrectly marked this as a header with no amount.

All extractors correctly identified the description. Visual verification confirms amounts '04 05 03' and the presence of a clear 'ob' symbol indicating a 0.5 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' captured the full amount and fraction correctly. 'gpt-5-mini' missed the fraction, and 'claude-haiku' misread the whole amount.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Calcott pro anno' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash') and amounts '03 03 03' with a 'qd' symbol for 0.75 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate extraction. 'gpt-5-mini' missed the fraction, and 'claude-haiku' misread the description and whole amounts.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Cudlington mills & mich' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash') and amounts '00 12 03' with an 'ob' symbol for 0.5 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate extraction. 'gpt-5-mini' misread the pounds, and 'claude-haiku' misread shillings, pence, and description.

Visual verification clearly shows no monetary amounts on this line. The description 'Bampton & biennio' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash') acts as a header/sub-header. 'claude-haiku' incorrectly assigned amounts that are not present on this line.

Visual verification clearly shows no monetary amounts on this line. The description (a name and a period, 'quinguienio et Dimid.') acts as a header/sub-header. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description. 'claude-haiku' correctly identified the row type.

Visual verification clearly shows no monetary amounts on this line. The description 'Hughes & Biennio' acts as a header/sub-header. 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini' provided the most accurate description. 'claude-haiku' correctly identified the row type.

Visual verification clearly shows no monetary amounts on this line. The description 'Greeneway & Triennio' acts as a header/sub-header. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description. 'claude-haiku' correctly identified the row type.

Visual verification clearly shows no monetary amounts on this line (columns are blank, not '00 00 00'). The description 'Walker & anno' acts as a sub-header. 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the absence of amounts. 'claude-haiku' incorrectly extracted zero amounts.
Full consensus across all extractors on description, amounts '00 15 0', and row type, confirmed by visual verification.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Minne & Biennio' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini') and amounts '01 00 00'. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate extraction. 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' incorrectly extracted 1 shilling.

Visual verification clearly shows no monetary amounts on this line (columns are blank). The description 'Molineux & anno' acts as a sub-header. 'gemini-flash' provided the most accurate description. 'claude-haiku' incorrectly extracted zero amounts.

Visual verification clearly shows no monetary amounts on this line (columns are blank). The description 'Sadler & mich' acts as a sub-header. Both 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' incorrectly extracted amounts, with 'claude-haiku' violating the hard rule for pence (18 pence).

Visual verification clearly shows 'Tintinhull' as a header for a braced group of items, with no amounts on this line. 'gemini-flash' provided the only accurate extraction. Both 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' were severely misaligned, extracting incorrect descriptions and amounts for this row, with 'claude-haiku' also violating hard rules for pence.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Napper pro sesquianno' and amounts '04 18 07' with a 'q' symbol for 0.75 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' provided the only accurate extraction for this specific row. 'gpt-5-mini' missed this row entirely, and 'claude-haiku' was misaligned.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Hopkins & Sesquianno' and amounts '02 12 01' with an 'ob' symbol for 0.5 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' provided the only accurate extraction. Both 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' were severely misaligned, with 'claude-haiku' violating hard rules for pence.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Clifton Ferry & anno' and amounts '06 07 08' with a 'q' symbol for 0.75 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' provided the only accurate extraction. Both 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' were severely misaligned.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Densington & triennio' and amounts '04 17 02'. 'gemini-flash' provided the only accurate extraction. Both 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' extracted amounts belonging to subsequent rows, indicating significant misalignment in this section.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Brew house & anno' and amounts '10 01 09' with a 'q' symbol for 0.75 pence fraction. 'gemini-flash' provided the only accurate extraction. Both 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' were severely misaligned.

Visual verification confirms the description 'South newton Tenemt & anno' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash') and amounts '08 03 06'. 'gemini-flash' provided the only accurate extraction. Both 'gpt-5-mini' and 'claude-haiku' were misaligned.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Fretherwin & sesqui anno' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash') and the absence of amounts. This acts as a header/sub-header. 'claude-haiku' incorrectly extracted zero amounts.

Visual verification confirms the description 'merton Vicarage & quadriennio' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash') and the absence of amounts. This acts as a header/sub-header. Both 'gemini-flash' and 'claude-haiku' incorrectly extracted amounts belonging to other rows.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Backgate Jennings' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini') and amounts '04 00 00'. 'gpt-5-mini' provided the most accurate extraction. 'gemini-flash' misread the pounds as 5.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Yardington mich' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini') and amounts '05 00 00'. 'gpt-5-mini' provided the most accurate extraction. 'gemini-flash' misread the amounts from a later row.

Visual verification confirms the amounts '05 07 02'. The description text is ambiguous in the image; 'gpt-5-mini''s transcription 'Tue entrents & anno' is visually closer to the raw characters, despite 'Due quitrents' being a plausible interpretation. Both 'gemini-flash' and 'claude-haiku' were misaligned or misread the amounts significantly.

Visual verification confirms the description 'Warner & Biennio' (most accurately transcribed by 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini') and amounts '00 08 00'. 'gpt-5-mini' provided the most accurate extraction. 'gemini-flash' incorrectly identified no amounts, and 'claude-haiku' missed this row entirely.

All extractors correctly identified the main amounts '322 19 9' and row type as 'total'. 'gemini-flash' and 'gpt-5-mini' correctly identified the blank description and the absence of a pence fraction (no 'ob' or other symbol after the 9). 'claude-haiku' incorrectly added 'TOTAL' to the description and a 0.5 pence fraction.
